First day of school shots and stock shots

Good morning Sarah!
I am reaching out today to confirm the details for LCA's upcoming first day and stock photos on Wednesday, September 3rd. My name is Beth and I will be your photographer for the morning.

Our notes have us arriving at 7:30 to capture first day arrivals, as well as getting some photographs of the building, classrooms, and grounds. Does this work for you? Is there a specific place you would like me to park when I arrive?

Best,
Beth

www.ismilestudios.com

to Beth, me, Matthew

Hello,

Thank you so much for reaching out! We are looking forward to having you. We are all set for Wednesday Sept 3rd.
Our staff park on the edge closest to the field edge of the parking lot. That would be the best place to park. Our door doesn't unlock until 7:30am. But I will try to be out there to meet you. I usually get in around 7:00am. If you want pictures of the rooms empty they will be empty between 7:30am-8:00am then the students start to go to the classrooms and many more arrive.

Please let me know if you have any questions or if there is anything else I can accommodate. You are welcome to grab coffee in our kitchen that morning as well.

Sarah Kettlewood

Subject: Fwd: Professional Headshot Booking
Hi Atalya!

Lauren Ramos forwarded me your request (below) for your headshot event and we would be thrilled to work with you!

Our services include bringing full studio lighting and a professional photographer on site.  We DO currently have November 29 open, and can give you either three or four hours that day depending on what you think you will need.

We can photograph roughly 45 adults an hour during a typical headshot event.  We always give our subjects a few different poses to choose from, but this goes very quickly once someone is seated, since there isn’t a ton of variety with a headshot.  Men tend to be a little quicker than women, but generally our pace is one person per minute with some cushioning built in, just in case someone is nervous or needs a little extra time.

All our headshots include retouching.   Also included is our online, secure and private platform where each student will receive a unique access code showing only their photos.  They will be able to view them online and order whatever they like!

We have two different approaches to pricing, depending on what works best for you:

OPTION ONE - BULK PRICING
We will provide headshots for everyone in attendance (at least two poses for each person) fully retouched in high resolution JPEG download at a rate of $300 per hour.  Students will be able to access their galleries and download their images at no charge to them.

OPTION TWO - INDIVIDUAL PRICING
We will come to you for no charge and give students the option to purchase digital headshots at $20 each (an 80% savings off our regular studio pricing).

Students will be able to see their images within 48 hours of the event and our platform sorts by student name and gives them a way to download their images independently - so you wouldn’t have to worry about keeping track of anything.

I know I just gave you a ton of information - so I am ready for any questions you may have!  I’m holding the date tentatively for you just in case this all looks perfect!

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,
Steph
